title: Data plan (test-data-planner output)
description: Per-unit case-creation/reuse plan emitted by test-data-planner after triage and before strategy. The strategist consumes it when writing each spec's data_setup; the executor consumes it to decide whether to call /create-case at run time and which fixtures to upload.

case_kind.description: e.g. 'AI-artifact-first MVA'. Required when case_decision=create_fresh; the /create-case skill uses this to drive the Case Type form field.

case_id.description: Required when case_decision=reuse_existing. Numeric case id from the prod tenant.

reuse_reason.description: Required when case_decision=reuse_existing. Free-text why reuse is justified (user-named fixture, data-free PR, etc.).

fixtures_needed.description: Required when case_decision=create_fresh. The set of fixtures the /create-case call will upload via --add. Subset of names found in fixtures/manifest.json (after any auto-add).

expected_event_types.description: The union of covers_event_types across all fixtures_needed, for human review.

fixture_gap.description: Required when case_decision=blocked_no_fixture. Names what was missing (e.g. 'No fixture in manifest covers ConversationFile uploads, and Drive search for chat-attachment-* returned zero matches').

manifest_changes.description: Entries added to fixtures/manifest.json during this planning run via Drive auto-search. Empty array if no auto-adds were needed.

blocked_units.description: Convenience: list of unit-ids that ended up in a case_group with case_decision=blocked_no_fixture.
